campaign_goal: Validate the pg_enigma campaign harness on the fixed `frontier_rebase/pr1394/train_gpt_human.py` base by enforcing downstream-only control-paired comparison first, then testing same-trace checkpoint/export selection, while carrying recurrence handoff and shared-trunk late branching as deferred next mechanisms once the harness exposes the needed primitives.

family_reports.name: State-Triggered Recurrence Handoff Program
family_reports.minimal_probe: After adding runtime state-conditioned control hooks, run a mid-training pack with 2 controls, one coarse late handoff realization, and one signal-triggered handoff realization, with final judgment on downstream `score_bpb`.
family_reports.expected_signal: A handoff realization shows a cleaner post-transition trajectory and then a downstream `score_bpb` gain beyond control spread at matched wall-clock budget.

family_reports.name: Shared-Trunk Late-Branch Portfolio
family_reports.minimal_probe: After branch-resume support exists, fork 2 to 4 late finishers from one trunk checkpoint plus 2 single-path controls and compare marginal downstream gain per extra finisher budget.
family_reports.expected_signal: At least one branch beats the single-path control on downstream `score_bpb` beyond control spread while using less total compute than training the same number of full independent runs.
deferred_reasons: pack kind pairwise_composition_pack is reserved for later campaign stages

family_reports.name: Checkpoint And Export Selector Family
family_reports.minimal_probe: From one training trace, evaluate a bounded late-checkpoint window against a fixed small export menu, with 2 controls carrying the published default checkpoint/export choice.
family_reports.expected_signal: A non-default checkpoint/export pair wins on downstream `score_bpb` by more than control spread, and the winner is not recoverable from final-step or pre-quant ranking alone.

family_reports.name: Control-Paired Delta Admission On Downstream Sliding Score
family_reports.minimal_probe: Run one 8-slot frontier selector pack with 2 exact controls, 2 replay-equivalent control clones, and 4 novel slots. Admit only by pack-local delta to paired controls on downstream `quantized_sliding_window` `score_bpb`.
family_reports.expected_signal: Control clones define a stable noise band and at least one non-control clears that band on downstream `score_bpb` without relying on pre-quant ranking.
